final:
module dac_8bit (
    input [7:0] din,
    input invalid,
    output reg [7:0] dout
);
    always @* begin
        if (invalid) begin
            dout = din; // Output follows the input when invalid
        end else begin
            dout = 8'b00000000; // Output zero when not invalid
        end
    end
endmodule
